where.if: AND CONCAT(u.mobile_first, u.mobile_second, u.mobile_third) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{mobile}, '%')

mapper.select:
SELECT `u`.`user_id` AS `userId`, `u`.`name` AS `name`, `u`.`email` AS `email`, `u`.`birth` AS `birth`, `u`.`gender` AS `gender`, `u`.`mobile_first` AS `mobileFirst`, `u`.`mobile_second` AS `mobileSecond`, `u`.`mobile_third` AS `mobileThird`, `u`.`role` AS `role`, `u`.`status` AS `status`, `u`.`created_at` AS `createdAt`, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `dodamdodam`.`loans` AS `l` WHERE `l`.`user_id` = `u`.`user_id` AND `l`.`status` = 'PENDING' ) AS `loanCount` FROM `dodamdodam`.`users` AS `u`
ORDER BY `u`.`created_at` DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
